reviews_data.review_text: The bows and smoothies are always so fresh and delicious, the workers are so kind, and the store is always clean & inviting— a great place to meet up with friends, study, or just drop in!
so yummy everytime!! the best employees are so nice as well 💕💕
Great atmosphere, treated me like family. I love the customer service I received and my Acia bowl tasted great
Highly recommend very nice staff Briell is great
10/10 ! Açaí with the protein powder was super good, the fruit ratio is perfect (they don’t skimp out), the portion is great. Fresh. Overall amazing !! Definitely will be going back
Honestly the best Açaí Bowl place I’ve been to, to date!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Dragon Bowl, Create Your Own Bowl

reviews_data.review_text:
We stopped by Palm Berries Midtown right after church and had a really good experience.

From the moment we walked in, Triniti greeted us and was super patient with us being first timers. She was friendly, easy to talk to, and made everything feel simple and welcoming. What stood out is that she was the same way with every guest that came in. You could tell she really enjoys what she does.

We decided to sit inside and enjoy our food and the vibe was so chill and relaxing. It was the perfect place to slow down for a bit.

The açaí bowls were amazing. Fresh, tasty, and just what we needed after church. Overall it was a great experience and we’ll definitely be back again.
Amazing food great atmosphere nice workers
Really good açaí bowls made fresh.
I love this place!
Nice spot, clean aesthetic. Great service. GET THE HORIZON or one of the bowls. 10/10 PULL UP

It’s a nice friendly place I was personally served by the owner. She took time out for me and helped me place my order. She was kind very nice sweet young lady I pray she be successful in her business
Super cute place💕💕💕
Ratio is definitely wrong for ($16) but I definitely will not return.
Always fresh and fast friendly service…
Always tastes fresh !!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Jennie! Thank you for leaving us feedback. We value your continued support and really enjoy seeing you in store. It is of the upmost importance that we uphold our standards on a consistent basis. We do want you to know that we saw you in store today as you are a well known customer, and we did have a trainee today who was making bowls when you were in store. It was their first shift making the bowls. As we are still a newer location, we are striving to build a strong team that consistently delivers quality, and we are so sorry that we fell short today. We do pride ourselves and the Palm Berries brand on our large portions so that our customers can enjoy a bowl that is well worth their money. If you could allow us to make this right, we’d love to provide you with a complimentary bowl that actually meets our standards, because what is pictured is not a representation of the quality that we strive for. Please feel free to email us at palmberriesmidtown@gmail.com!
reviews_data.review_text: I love Palm Berries and have been a fan for years, regularly visiting locations in Raleigh, Concord, and Charlotte Midtown. The staff at the Midtown location are always so kind. However, I’ve noticed that the quantity of toppings I receive there has been inconsistent lately. I usually order a Create Your Own Bowl with double goji berries, and my recent visit was disappointing because the amount of toppings was significantly less than what I get at other locations. I’ve attached two images to illustrate the difference between what I received today and what I typically receive at other Palm Berries locations. Despite this, I will continue to support all Palm Berries businesses because I truly enjoy the taste and the friendly service. I just hope for more consistency in food quality in the future.
Bring back the biscoff bowl!!!
Great service, clean restroom, nice playlist. Parking is as expected in that area, but great place to stop for a sweet treat. And Black Woman Owned so even better!

🥥 PALM BERRIES NC — The Freshness Kingdom 🍓🍌🍍
If freshness had a home address, it would be Palm Berries. Everything tastes like it was picked 12 seconds ago — fruit that snaps, açaí that’s cold and thick (not that sad watery stuff), and toppings that actually crunch.

This place is basically:
🌞 Beach vibes
👶 Kid‑approved
💪 Health‑friendly
😌 Chill crowd energy
🥗 Nutrition without the lecture

---

🍧 THE MENU: MULTIPLE CHOICE HEAVEN
Palm Berries is basically a test you want to take.
You walk in and they hit you with:

A) Açaí bowls — thick, cold, fresh, Instagram‑ready 📸
B) Pitaya bowls — neon pink happiness 💖
C) Smoothies — kid‑friendly, adult‑approved, no weird aftertaste 🥤
D) Protein add‑ons — for the gym warriors 🏋️
E) All of the above — the correct answer 😌

Every bowl feels like a custom build — base, fruit, drizzle, crunch.
You’re basically the architect of your own tropical empire 🏝️✨

---

🍉 THE CROWD: VIBES CHECK
Palm Berries attracts:
- Chill people who want something light and refreshing 😎
- Parents with kids who need a healthy win that still tastes like dessert 👶🍨
- Gym folks grabbing a post‑workout bowl 💪
- Teens taking pictures of their food like it’s a celebrity 📸
- People escaping the chaos of life for 10 minutes of fruity peace 🍃

It’s a zero‑stress zone. No loud chaos, no weird energy — just fruit, smiles, and cold bowls.

---

🍍 THE FRESHNESS FACTOR (MAXED OUT)
Palm Berries bowls hit different because:
- Fruit is fresh, not mushy 🍓
- Açaí is thick, not icy ❄️
- Granola is crunchy, not stale 🥣
- Drizzles are clean, not syrupy 🍯
- Everything tastes like it came from a tropical island, not a freezer truck 🌴

You can literally taste the difference.

---

⭐ FINAL VERDICT
Palm Berries NC is:
🔥 Fresh
🔥 Fast
🔥 Kid‑friendly
🔥 Health‑friendly
🔥 Chill‑crowd approved
🔥 Açaí done right

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Eddie! Thank you so much for taking the time to give us feedback and for your continued support. We are deeply apologetic for this occurrence, and it is of the upmost importance to provide consistent and excellent products and customer service. If you could, please email palmberriesmidtown@gmail.com so that we can not only issue you a refund, but rectify the situation. Thank you.
reviews_data.review_text: Lauren is amazing and truly cares about quality. Thank you!
Friendly staff, excellent bowls, and cool atmosphere. Huge fan of this place.

Palm Berries is honestly one of my favorite bowl spots. The service is always great and the atmosphere is really nice. The staff is friendly every time I come in, so they definitely deserve 5 stars for that.

But I have to say… I’m still upset they discontinued the Biscoff bowl. That was easily the BEST thing on the menu and the whole reason I kept coming back.  it just hasn’t been the same.

If they ever bring the Biscoff bowl back, I’ll happily change this to 5 stars immediately because that bowl was elite 😭.

The atmosphere is very nice and beautiful, and the staff inside is very friendly. The menu is open and has a good variety of options. I had the Sunset bowl, and the other one we got was custom-made. They weren’t too different from each other, but both were good. I do wish they had given me a little more granola.

What really separates this place from other spots is the staff. They’re very welcoming and make the experience even better. It’s cool to try these types of bowls at different places, and this one stands out because of the people working there.
I always order the Superhuman bowl with strawberries, bananas, chia and flax seeds with an almond butter topping and it is delicious!

Very impressed with the customer service. The person who took my order had an extremely pleasant demeanor and was super helpful answering my questions and offering suggestions. The decor was also very bright and whimsical. I ordered a Flamingo sip, and it was delicious! Would def return!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text:
My favorite açaí in Charlotte!

It’s so so so yummy. I love their ratio of smoothie to fruit to granola. They also have fun seasonal flavors! Biscoff bowl goes HARD.

Sometimes it’s a wait, but I’d rather they make it fresh than have premade.
great!
Always Great
Great açaí bowl! The customer service was amazing.
The best!
No complaints. It was great.
The food is amazing! And great service!Must try!

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text:
Absolutely delicious acai bowls! I had been eagerly awaiting their opening for a few months and was excited to try as I had heard good things about their other locations. I was blown away by all the various flavor options and the friendliness of the staff. The associate working that morning listened to what I was craving and made a recommendation which was delicious (the Sami bowl). I really appreciate that they offer multiple sizes, as I usually find a "regular" sized acai bowl to be too much for me. As for the bowl itself, the flavors balance each other perfectly and everything tasted fresh.

I loved the wall in the back that explained the different ingredients and how they are beneficial to your health. The store itself is beautifully decorated and spotlessly clean. I ate inside and found the seating to be comfortable, especially by the fireplace!
One of the best acai bowls
This was so good I’m so sad cause I ate it all and I want more. Currently thinking about when I just first had it and now my bowl is empty. Go get your açaí bowls guys. It’s also so cheap
AMAZE!!

So I forgot to take photos of my bowl, but it was really good! I gotta jumbo, build your own with the very berry, protein, blue spirulina with kiwi and pineapple topics and honey and biscoff. Lexi is the best she was paitent and understanding and the staff in the back made my bowl with ease one of the best açaí spots in clt.

Literally the missing element to what Charlotte needed.
Super friendly, and excited to host me and my friends.
They even let us make changes at the last minute with no problem.
Definitely my new spot! 😋
So yummy staff is so nice
Space is beautiful. Staff is always super friendly. And the bowls are elite! I can't get enough of the biscoff bowl!

First time and I was blown away!!!!! BEST açaí bowl I’ve ever had like EVER. Whoever was working today was not greedy AT ALL. Extremely impressed with the atmosphere and the Dubai chocolate açaí bowl I got blew me AWAY. 1000000/10. I will be back for that biscoff bowl best believe <3

Was in the area grabbing lunch and was pleasantly surprised to see an açaí bowl storefront! Decided to share a regular CYO bowl. Ordered classic base with pineapple, blueberries, banana, coconut flake, goji berries, and honey drizzle. A whopping $22 treat! It definitely is more cost effective if you choose one of the already created bowls which for a regular range from $13.50-$14.50 per bowl. I consider myself an açaí bowl connoisseur and for me everything was a bit overly sweet. Still a fresh alternative to other less healthy choices. Great location, Love the decor and vibes inside. The staff are friendly and helpful. Added bonus is the location is woman owned.
I was lucky enough to meet the owner, Lauryn, and have a chat with her while I enjoyed the best acai I’ve found in North Carolina. Fresh and beautiful bowls!
it was soooo good, my first time going! so many affordable and healthy options ☺️☺️
As an açaí bowl fanatic, I can say this is one of the best places I’ve been. There are lots of base and topping options and friendly customer service. Definitely recommend!
Horizon is best smoothie I have ever had!

Disappointed in the bump in price. I use to come 5 times a week, now that the regular bowl is nearly $16, I have to compare to other restaurants, where I could nearly get a full steak dinner or expensive sushi roll vs little fruit bowl. It just doesn't seem fair price wise anymore, still love the bowls, a shame for sure.
The biscoff bowl will CHANGE YOUR LIFE trust me
LITERALLY THE BEST ACAI

We picked up acai bowls to have for breakfast at work and they were so delicious! I have multiple dietary restrictions and palm berries was so accommodating. I was easily able to order online and special instructions. My bowl was 10/10. I am going to share with all my friends and can’t wait to go back!
Such great hospitality, also the best Açai bowls in Queen City!

They have the best açaí bowls, so fresh, flavorful, and beautifully made! Lauryn, the owner, was so nice and welcoming, which made the experience even better. You can tell she truly cares about her customers and loves what she does. Definitely my new go-to spot for açaí bowls!
You get way more toppings and flavor than similarly priced smoothie bowl places. Also a good WFH spot for a couple people!
Fun and sweetest staff , and Lauryn is awesome. The açai bowls are amazing with my favs being The Dragon & Biscoff bowls. The smoothies are top tier too! Sooo recommended.
Fresh ingredients, amazing atmosphere!

Stopped by Palm Berries Charlotte on opening day, and the place was such a vibe. The energy was bright, welcoming, and tropical — you can’t help but feel good when you walk in.

The space is beautiful with bright murals, colorful décor, and that island energy that makes the whole place feel like a mini escape. The staff was friendly and attentive, and Lauryn, the owner, was there greeting everyone with the warmest energy and genuine excitement.

We tried the Green Sip, Banana Berry Smoothie, and the Biscoff Bowl — and everything was delicious. The Biscoff Bowl especially stood out as one of the best açaí bowls I’ve had in Charlotte. Fresh, flavorful, and beautifully made.

I’ll definitely be back. This spot is a whole experience.
Really cutesy very simple fruits made to look and taste amazing blended into drinks and the little bowls are delicious. I don't like fruit bowls much and I enjoyed this little spot. 10/10 for me
